# run-parallel-tasks-and-consolidate
Description: Initiate multiple tasks in parallel, then consolidate their results once all are complete.
Source: project
1. Identify the set of tasks that need to be executed.
2. Initiate all identified tasks to run concurrently.
3. Monitor the progress of each task.
4. Wait for all initiated tasks to reach completion.
5. Gather and combine the individual results from each completed task into a single, consolidated output.
